content: # Best AI Writing Tools for Novelists in 2026 Writing a novel is a massive undertaking — but AI tools can help you beat writer's block, develop rich characters, and make consistent progress! Let's explore the best tools for novelists. Also check out our complete [[link:/category/Writing|Writing category]]! --- ## 1. [[link:/tools/23|Rytr]] — Drafts, Ideas, and Editing ✍️ Rytr is perfect for generating drafts, exploring story ideas, and editing your prose — all at an affordable price! ### Why Novelists Love It - 💡 **Beat writer's block** — generate ideas instantly - 📝 **Flexible templates** — for every part of your novel - 💰 **Affordable** — fits any writer's budget **Try Rytr Free**: {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}} --- ## 2. [[link:/tools/6|ChatGPT]] — Conversational Story Development 🎭 ChatGPT acts like a writing partner — brainstorm plots, develop characters, and talk through story problems conversationally! ### Key Benefits - 🤝 **Collaborative brainstorming** — talk through your ideas - 🧩 **Character development** — create deep, complex characters - 📊 **Plot outlining** — structure your story effectively **Try ChatGPT**: https://chat.openai.com --- ## AI Toolkit for Novelists | Tool | Best For | Time Saved | |------|----------|------------| | Rytr | Drafts & editing | 2-5 hours/week | | ChatGPT | Brainstorming & character development | 3-6 hours/week | Ready to make consistent progress on your novel? Try these tools and write the book you've always wanted to! --- For more insights, check out our guide: AI Writing Assistants vs Human Editors: What's the Difference in 2026 **Final CTA**: Start with Rytr — it's the most affordable and easy-to-use tool for novelists! {{AFFILIATE_RYTR}}
